creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2011-06-28 00:19:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games/redeclipse     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    games/redeclipse/files patch-src_Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/redeclipse/files reclient.in reserver.in 
  Removed files:
    games/redeclipse/files bfclient.in bfserver.in 
  Log:
  Red Eclipse is a single-player and multi-player first-person ego-shooter,
  built as a total conversion of Cube Engine 2, which lends itself toward
  a balanced gameplay, with a general theme of agility in a variety of
  environments.
  
  WWW:    http://www.redeclipse.net/
  
  PR:             155682, 156010, 158308 (taken some bits from)
  Submitted by:   Sender Ghost <lightside@safebox.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.30      +37 -16    ports/games/redeclipse/Makefile

  1.3       +0 -3      ports/games/redeclipse/files/bfserver.in (dead)
